zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix of Namur於1110年出生在比利時納姆爾時，她的父親Godfrey de Namur44歲，母親Ermesinde von Luxembourg31歲。她和Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1160年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix of Namur was born in 1110, in Namur, Belgium, her father, Godfrey de Namur, was 44 and her mother, Ermesinde von Luxembourg, was 31. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel. She died in 1160, in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix of Namur est née en 1110, à Namur, Belgique, son père, Godfrey de Namur, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Ermesinde von Luxembourg, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel. Elle est décédée en 1160, à Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix of Namur 1110 in Namen, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfrey de Namur 44 und ihre Mutter Ermesinde von Luxembourg 31. Sie hatte mit Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1160 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix of Namur è nata il nel 1110 nel Namur, Belgio, sua padre, Godfrey de Namur, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Ermesinde von Luxembourg, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel. Morì nel 1160, nel Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix of Namurが1110年にベルギーナムルで生まれた時，父Godfrey de Namurは44歳，母Ermesinde von Luxembourgは31歳であった。彼女はGauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethelとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1160年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンで50歳で死去した。

ko.Vitre, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix of Namur(이)가 1110년 벨기에 남어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfrey de Namur(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermesinde von Luxembourg(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1160년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix of Namur nasceu em 1110, em Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Godfrey de Namur, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Ermesinde von Luxembourg, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel. Ela faleceu em 1160, em Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix of Namur родилась в 1110 г. в местности намур, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Godfrey de Namur было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Ermesinde von Luxembourg, 31. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel. Она умерла в 1160 г. в местности меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel. Murió en 1160, en Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
